rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §21.253 governs teacher hearing request deadlines. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 21.253. REQUEST FOR HEARING. (a) A teacher must file a written request for a hearing under this subchapter with the commissioner not later than the 15th day after the date the teacher receives written notice of the proposed action.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption change and this education code provision.
